tldr_zh: OpenAI推安全模式，川普政府考慮入股；S&P 500拒納AI巨頭；中東戰火持續。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches security mode, Trump eyes equity stake; S&P 500 rejects AI giants; Middle East conflicts persist.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出「鎖定模式」強化ChatGPT安全，防範提示注入攻擊
items.title_en: OpenAI Unveils "Lockdown Mode" to Enhance ChatGPT Security Against Prompt Injection Attacks
items.summary_zh: OpenAI為其ChatGPT服務推出「鎖定模式」，旨在保護敏感資料免受提示注入攻擊。此舉雖無法完全杜絕漏洞，但能大幅降低敏感資訊外洩的風險，提升企業級用戶的資料安全性。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has introduced "Lockdown Mode" for its ChatGPT service, aiming to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks. While it may not entirely eliminate vulnerabilities, this feature significantly reduces the risk of sensitive information leakage, enhancing data security for enterprise users.

items.title_zh: 傳川普政府考慮入股OpenAI，欲讓美國人民從AI成功中獲益
items.title_en: Trump Administration Reportedly Considers Equity Stake in OpenAI for Public Benefit
items.summary_zh: 據報導，川普政府正與OpenAI討論潛在的股權交易，目標是讓美國人民從人工智慧的成功中受益。此舉可能標誌著政府對領先AI公司採取更直接的經濟參與策略。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration is reportedly discussing a potential equity deal with OpenAI, aiming for the American people to benefit from the success of artificial intelligence. This move could signal a more direct economic involvement strategy by the government in leading AI companies.

items.title_zh: S&P 500指數拒絕SpaceX及OpenAI、Anthropic等非營利AI公司納入
items.title_en: S&P 500 Rejects SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic from Index Inclusion
items.summary_zh: 標普500指數拒絕了SpaceX以及OpenAI和Anthropic等主要AI公司快速納入的請求。此決定意味著這些公司將無法輕易獲得數十億美元的被動投資，凸顯了市場對其盈利能力和治理結構的考量。
items.summary_en: The S&P 500 index has rejected requests for the rapid inclusion of SpaceX and major AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic. This decision means these firms will not gain easy access to billions of dollars from passive investors, highlighting market considerations regarding their profitability and governance structures.

items.title_zh: 蘋果WWDC 2026將登場，Siri大改版與Apple Intelligence更新備受期待
items.title_en: Apple's WWDC 2026 Anticipated to Feature Major Siri Revamp and Apple Intelligence Updates
items.summary_zh: 蘋果年度全球開發者大會（WWDC 2026）即將舉行，市場高度期待Siri的重大改版以及Apple Intelligence的最新進展。這些更新預計將展示蘋果在人工智慧領域的最新布局與使用者體驗提升。
items.summary_en: Apple's annual Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC 2026) is approaching, with high anticipation for a significant revamp of Siri and the latest updates to Apple Intelligence. These enhancements are expected to showcase Apple's newest strategies in AI and improvements to user experience.

items.title_zh: 烏克蘭無人機襲擊聖彼得堡，俄羅斯稱此為「前所未有」的攻擊
items.title_en: Ukrainian Drones Target St. Petersburg in "Unprecedented" Attack, Says Russia
items.summary_zh: 烏克蘭無人機對俄羅斯第二大城市聖彼得堡發動襲擊，俄羅斯稱這是「前所未有」的攻擊。這是自戰爭爆發以來，該市居民首次被敦促留在家中，顯示戰事已深入俄羅斯境內。
items.summary_en: Ukrainian drones have targeted St. Petersburg, Russia's second-largest city, in what Russia describes as an "unprecedented" attack. Residents were urged to stay indoors for the first time since the war began, indicating the conflict's deeper reach into Russian territory.

items.title_zh: 美國與伊朗在波斯灣互發襲擊，停火協議面臨最新考驗
items.title_en: US and Iran Exchange Strikes in Gulf, Testing Latest Ceasefire
items.summary_zh: 美國軍方襲擊了伊朗的無人機和雷達站，而德黑蘭則聲稱已鎖定科威特和巴林境內的美國基地。這場在波斯灣的互襲行動，是對停火協議的最新考驗，加劇了地區緊張局勢。
items.summary_en: The U.S. military struck Iranian drones and radar sites, while Tehran claimed to have targeted U.S. bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. This exchange of strikes in the Gulf is the latest test of the ceasefire, escalating regional tensions.

items.title_zh: 衛生官員證實，以色列部隊在約旦河西岸殺害一名巴勒斯坦嬰兒
items.title_en: Health Officials Confirm Israeli Forces Killed Palestinian Baby in Occupied West Bank
items.summary_zh: 衛生官員證實，一名七個月大的巴勒斯坦男嬰在約旦河西岸被以色列部隊槍殺。這起悲劇發生時，嬰兒與父母同車，再次引發對衝突區平民安全的嚴重關切。
items.summary_en: Health officials have confirmed that a seven-month-old Palestinian baby boy was shot dead by Israeli soldiers in the occupied West Bank. The tragedy occurred while the infant was in a vehicle with his parents, raising serious concerns about civilian safety in the conflict zone.

items.title_zh: 以色列襲擊黎巴嫩車輛，造成一名黎巴嫩將軍及三名士兵死亡
items.title_en: Lebanese General Among Three Soldiers Killed in Israeli Attack on Car
items.summary_zh: 在黎巴嫩南部，一名黎巴嫩將軍與另外兩名士兵在一場以色列對車輛的襲擊中喪生。以色列軍方正在調查此事件，這起攻擊可能進一步加劇以色列與真主黨之間的衝突。
items.summary_en: In southern Lebanon, a Lebanese general and two other soldiers were killed in an Israeli attack on a car. The Israeli military is investigating the incident, which could further escalate the conflict between Israel and Hezbollah.

items.title_zh: 白宮AI顧問Sriram Krishnan離職，將成立新機構繼續影響川普AI政策
items.title_en: White House AI Advisor Sriram Krishnan Departs, to Form New Institution for Trump's AI Policy
items.summary_zh: 白宮人工智慧顧問Sriram Krishnan宣布離職，據報導他將成立一個新機構，以繼續塑造川普政府的AI政策。此舉顯示美國在AI政策制定方面可能出現新的方向和影響力。
items.summary_en: White House AI advisor Sriram Krishnan has announced his departure, reportedly to establish a new institution aimed at continuing to shape the Trump administration's AI policy. This move suggests potential new directions and influences in U.S. AI policy formulation.

items.title_zh: Reid Hoffman辭去微軟董事職務，專注於其AI藥物發現新創公司
items.title_en: Reid Hoffman Steps Down from Microsoft Board to Focus on AI Drug Discovery Startup
items.summary_zh: 知名投資人Reid Hoffman在微軟董事會任職十年後宣布辭職，將全力投入其人工智慧藥物發現新創公司Manus。此舉反映了科技界領袖對AI領域創業的濃厚興趣和投入。
items.summary_en: Prominent investor Reid Hoffman has resigned from Microsoft's board after a decade, to fully dedicate himself to his AI drug discovery startup, Manus. This move reflects the strong interest and commitment of tech leaders to entrepreneurship in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: 前網路安全主管指控IBM掩蓋多起2010年代中期資料外洩事件
items.title_en: Former Cybersecurity Executive Accuses IBM of Covering Up Multiple Mid-2010s Data Breaches
items.summary_zh: 一名前網路安全主管提起訴訟，指控IBM及其兩家子公司在2010年代中期曾發生多起資料外洩事件，但IBM卻未披露並積極掩蓋。這項指控對IBM的企業誠信和資料安全管理構成嚴重挑戰。
items.summary_en: A former cybersecurity executive has filed a lawsuit, accusing IBM and two of its subsidiaries of covering up several data breaches that allegedly occurred in the mid-2010s. This accusation poses a serious challenge to IBM's corporate integrity and data security management.

items.title_zh: 美國首個小型模組化核反應爐首次測試達到臨界狀態
items.title_en: First US Small Modular Nuclear Reactor Reaches Criticality in Initial Test
items.summary_zh: 由新創公司Antares開發的美國首個小型模組化核反應爐（SMR）在首次測試中成功達到臨界狀態。儘管該反應爐尚未準備好發電，但這是推動下一代核能技術發展的重要里程碑。
items.summary_en: The first U.S. small modular nuclear reactor (SMR), developed by startup Antares, has successfully reached criticality in its initial test. Although the reactor is not yet ready to generate power, this marks a significant milestone in advancing next-generation nuclear energy technology.
